Off Calendar Feb-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS NORTHSHORE RESOUCES IV, LP, NORTHSHORE RESOURCES VIII, LP, NORTHSHORE RESOURCES IX, LP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Appearances: Lee J. Novich, Esq. of the Construction Law Group (415) 537-3900 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Gerald M. Murphy, Esq. of Luce Forward, (415) 356-4689 appearing for Defendant and moving party. (This tentative ruling is not being contested.) The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer overruled, ten days leave to answer. The lien sufficiently describes the property. Timeliness of the lien is a factual issue. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
